name: Layered Chicken & Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 ounces) frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix broccoli, onion, garlic, 1/4 teaspoon salt and pepper in a round microwavable dish, 8 x 11 inches.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 3 to 4 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender; stir.
3. Layer chicken and water chestnuts evenly over broccoli.
4. Cover with waxed paper and microwave for 3 minutes.
5. Mix sour cream, milk, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Pour evenly over water chestnuts.
6. Sprinkle with cheeses and paprika. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on medium-high (70%) for 3 to 5 minutes or until cheeses are melted.
7. Serve 6 servings.
